name: the Cinder Tyrant's warblade
description: A long, single-edged blade of blackened slag-steel that drinks the light along its length and bleeds a thin line of trapped fire down its fuller. Reforged from the throne-scar of Vhalgrimm itself, the warblade is faintly warm even at rest and its edge sears shut every wound it opens. It is a cruel, magnificent thing, and it remembers being a demon.
